The selection now survives focus changes.

### Fixed
- **Selection no longer vanishes when a pane loses focus.** The skin carried two copies of FlatMonkey's "less prominent" MediaTree exception whose `background-color: inherit` beat the unfocused accent selection but lost to the focused one — so the accent bar appeared only while the pane was focused, with dark text invisible otherwise. Both copies are removed; trees use the same uniform accent selection in both focus states.
- Hovering a selected row in an unfocused pane no longer dims the accent bar.

### Important — clean restart
Fully quit MediaMonkey (also from the system tray) and make sure no orphaned `MediaMonkeyEngine.exe` processes linger (Task Manager), then delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css` and start MediaMonkey.
